text.title: Weighted Decision Matrix Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the trade-off-decision-matrix methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: frame-question
step.action: Write the question as a single sentence; list 2-5 options.

step.name: set-weights
step.action: Each stakeholder owns one criterion; weights sum to 100%.

step.name: score-with-evidence
step.action: Score each option 1-5 per criterion; cite evidence per score.

step.name: compute-totals-and-conflicts
step.action: Compute weighted totals; identify ≥1 criterion conflict + resolution rule.

step.name: tie-break-if-close
step.action: If top two within ≤5%, apply documented tie-break rule.

step.name: publish-with-adr
step.action: Attach matrix to ADR; set review date.
